question_en: How is Bitcoin introduced in this unit?
choices_en: As the successful culmination of long digital-cash experimentation
choices_ko: 오랜 디지털 현금 실험의 성공적 귀결로
explanation_en: Bitcoin is presented as the first successful culmination of decades of work on decentralized digital money.
explanation_ko: 비트코인은 수십 년간 이어진 탈중앙 디지털 화폐 실험의 첫 성공적 귀결로 제시된다.
